entries.title: Add actor registry helper
entries.summary: Publish a reusable helper for actor lookup and actor-type enforcement.

entries.title: Reconcile runtime boundary requirements
entries.summary: Update requirements rows only where reusable-core surfaces are already implemented and tested.

entries.title: Refactor live approval caller
entries.summary: Move initiative approval maintainer checks onto the reusable actor helper.

entries.title: Publish artifact family registry schema
entries.summary: Add the governed schema contract for the plan-pack artifact family registry.

entries.title: Seed artifact family registry entries
entries.summary: Seed the initial plan-pack artifact family taxonomy for live initiative, task, evidence, promotion, discrepancy, project, and aggregate surfaces.

entries.title: Validate artifact family registry coverage
entries.summary: Add validation coverage proving the artifact family registry stays aligned with current live plan artifact schemas and indexes.

entries.title: Build live plan artifact index and query surface
entries.summary: Build plan/.wt/artifact_index.json from live plan artifact families and expose it through a first-class query command.

entries.title: Publish artifact index contract and neutralize legacy fields
entries.summary: Update the generic pack artifact-index contract, typed models, and validation so challenge-specific and platform-specific leakage is replaced by plan-safe provenance fields.

entries.title: Validate artifact index coverage and guidance
entries.summary: Add tests, validator wiring, and command guidance proving the live artifact index stays aligned with requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Add initiative package closeout helper
entries.summary: Publish a reusable closeout helper for initiative-package artifact coordination under watchtower_core.closeout.

entries.title: Refactor live plan closeout onto shared helper
entries.summary: Route InitiativePackageService terminal closeout through the shared package closeout helper while preserving repo-local path orchestration.

entries.title: Validate closeout boundary alignment
entries.summary: Add focused closeout coverage and reconcile the closeout requirements rows to the implemented package boundary.

entries.title: Add core validation coverage
entries.summary: Extend loader and tests so the core-owned documentation governance stack validates cleanly and resolves explicitly by path.

entries.title: Publish core documentation schema contracts
entries.summary: Add core-owned schema contracts for documentation family bindings, template catalog metadata, and core section-spec schemas.

entries.title: Seed core registries and templates
entries.summary: Create core control-plane documentation family bindings, template catalog entries, and reusable template files for core docs and workflows.

entries.title: Publish discrepancy helper contracts
entries.summary: Add a reusable helper for governed discrepancy records, severity, and resolution behavior.

entries.title: Refactor live plan discrepancy writes onto helper
entries.summary: Move initiative package and plan workspace discrepancy creation and reconciliation onto the reusable helper.

entries.title: Validate discrepancy helper and requirements alignment
entries.summary: Add coverage for discrepancy creation and resolution, then update touched requirements rows to current state.

entries.title: Publish documentation family and template catalog schemas
entries.summary: Add the governed schema contracts for the plan-owned documentation-family registry and template catalog.

entries.title: Seed registry entries and governed template assets
entries.summary: Seed active documentation-family bindings, template catalog entries, and concrete template files for the current live plan surfaces.

entries.title: Wire typed helpers and validation coverage
entries.summary: Add typed loader support, helper APIs, and tests that prove the new registries and template assets resolve cleanly.

entries.title: Copy foundations corpus into both roots
entries.summary: Duplicate the current foundations documents into both the core and plan docs roots without changing their shared guidance content.

entries.title: Seed duplicated foundations roots
entries.summary: Prepare the core/docs/foundations and plan/docs/foundations roots and align their README surfaces.

entries.title: Validate duplicated foundations discovery
entries.summary: Refresh derived indexes and confirm the duplicated foundations roots are discoverable without breaking current guidance lookup.

entries.title: Publish plan authority entrypoints
entries.summary: Capture the pack-wide start-here surfaces for the new live plan authority.

entries.title: Validate pack-wide proof package
entries.summary: Prove the pack-wide initiative can reach ready_for_execution cleanly.

entries.title: Publish event stream helper contracts
entries.summary: Add a reusable helper for seeded event records, append-only event writes, and deterministic replay over plan pack initiative and task streams.

entries.title: Refactor initiative package event writes onto helper
entries.summary: Move initiative and task event creation in initiative_packages.py onto the reusable helper without changing current event contracts.

entries.title: Validate event stream helper and contracts
entries.summary: Add tests proving seeded records, append behavior, replay ordering, and initiative package regressions stay aligned with requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Define reusable evidence bundle helper contract
entries.summary: Add typed evidence-bundle models and helper surfaces under watchtower_core.evidence.

entries.title: Reconcile evidence requirements and package docs
entries.summary: Update requirements.md and evidence package docs to reflect the broadened reusable evidence boundary.

entries.title: Refactor live plan evidence callers onto the helper
entries.summary: Use the new helper for initiative bootstrap evidence bundles and evidence-index summaries.

entries.title: Add typed extraction output envelope helper
entries.summary: Publish reusable typed models and helper methods for the pack-facing extraction output envelope contract.

entries.title: Validate extraction output alignment
entries.summary: Add focused tests and requirements reconciliation proving the extraction envelope now aligns with promotion flows.

entries.title: Wire guidance promotion through extraction stage
entries.summary: Refactor guidance promotion so extraction is an explicit validated stage before durable promotion output is written.

entries.title: Publish generic query harness contracts
entries.summary: Add export-safe query modules, search parameter types, and reusable query services under watchtower_core.query.

entries.title: Refactor repo query services onto public query surface
entries.summary: Move generic repo-local query implementations onto the reusable-core query surface without moving plan-live query services out of repo_ops.

entries.title: Validate query harness export and guidance
entries.summary: Add boundary tests and package guidance proving watchtower_core.query now exports reusable generic query services aligned to requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Publish generic sync harness contracts
entries.summary: Add the export-safe sync harness, shared result types, and reusable protocols under watchtower_core.sync.

entries.title: Refactor repo sync orchestration onto generic harness
entries.summary: Move all-sync and coordination-sync orchestration onto the generic sync harness without changing current sync target behavior.

entries.title: Validate sync harness export and guidance
entries.summary: Add tests and documentation proving watchtower_core.sync now publishes the reusable harness and remains aligned with requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Add governance surface dependency coverage
entries.summary: Add unit coverage proving the helper resolves both pack-declared and governance-map surfaces and reports dependent declared surfaces.

entries.title: Add governance surface resolver helper
entries.summary: Implement a reusable-core helper that resolves governed surface path, authority, rebuildability, and declaration source.

entries.title: Validate governance surface resolver behavior
entries.summary: Run targeted validation proving the helper stays aligned with requirements.md, decisions.md, and the active pack settings declarations.

entries.title: Implement governed guidance promotion flow
entries.summary: Promote approved initiative outputs into plan/docs guidance roots with policy, template, and mirror enforcement.

entries.title: Publish promotion helper contracts
entries.summary: Add typed promotion-policy and guidance-promotion helper contracts for governed extraction flows.

entries.title: Validate promoted guidance extraction and requirements alignment
entries.summary: Add coverage for promotion output, mirror handling, and touched requirements rows.

entries.title: Add human-surface policy contract and helper
entries.summary: Add the human_surface_policy_registry schema, registry, typed loader support, and a helper that resolves required, optional, and forbidden human surfaces by root.

entries.title: Seed missing core human roots and router surfaces
entries.summary: Create the missing core/, core/docs/, and core/workflows/ entrypoint surfaces and any thin router files required by the new human-surface policy.

entries.title: Validate human-surface policy and root compliance
entries.summary: Add focused tests and validation coverage proving the registry, helper, and current repo roots conform to requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Classify legacy history and transitional archive surfaces
entries.summary: Encode the current and clean-endstate retention policy for docs/planning history, plan initiative archives, promoted guidance, and purge ledgers, and align adjacent entrypoint docs.

entries.title: Publish retention-policy registry and loader support
entries.summary: Add the retention_policy_registry schema, registry, typed model support, and helper methods for resolving current versus clean-endstate retention decisions.

entries.title: Validate retention policy alignment and follow-up linkage
entries.summary: Add focused tests and close the legacy follow-up task once the new plan initiative and policy artifacts are linked from the capture-first bootstrap package.

entries.title: Publish lifecycle review and source registry schemas
entries.summary: Add governed schema contracts for the lifecycle-stage, review-status, and source-type registries.

entries.title: Seed lifecycle review and source vocab entries
entries.summary: Seed active registry entries aligned to current plan-workspace lifecycle stages, review states, and provenance categories.

entries.title: Wire typed helper and validation coverage
entries.summary: Add typed loader support, a vocabulary helper, and tests proving the registries stay aligned with live schemas and runtime use.

entries.title: Implement live evidence closeout and review indexes
entries.summary: Add aggregate index contracts, rebuild logic, and query surfaces for initiative-local evidence, closeout, and review state.

entries.title: Reconcile environment-context scope in authoritative requirements
entries.summary: Remove environment_context from the required clean-endstate surfaces and align supporting requirements rows.

entries.title: Validate index rebuilds and requirements alignment
entries.summary: Add coverage for the new aggregates, sync behavior, and updated requirements current-state rows.

entries.title: Add readiness discrepancy and project query commands
entries.summary: Expose the live readiness, discrepancy, and project index surfaces through first-class query commands and payloads.

entries.title: Refresh docs and validate live query cutover
entries.summary: Update command docs, authority guidance, and regression coverage so the public query surface matches the plan/.wt authority model.

entries.title: Reroot public planning queries onto live plan indexes
entries.summary: Move the public coordination, initiatives, tasks, and authority query path from legacy docs-backed planning indexes to the authoritative plan/.wt indexes and rendered surfaces.

entries.title: Add reusable path and id helper
entries.summary: Implement a reusable-core helper for canonical slugs, ids, and plan-workspace root paths.

entries.title: Refactor plan runtime callers onto the helper
entries.summary: Adopt the helper in initiative, project, and related runtime surfaces that currently hand-roll canonical names and paths.

entries.title: Validate helper coverage and reconcile requirements
entries.summary: Add focused tests for the helper and align requirements.md with the implemented runtime seam.

entries.title: Expose project context query surface
entries.summary: Add a bounded CLI query path that loads pack context and project context explicitly for one project-scoped target.

entries.title: Extract project context runtime helper
entries.summary: Move project-scoped context loading behind a first-class runtime surface that builds on project record and repository map artifacts.

entries.title: Validate project context load contract
entries.summary: Add integration and command coverage proving separate project-context loading and scope-aware query behavior.

entries.title: Publish project surface policy registry schema
entries.summary: Add the governed schema contract for the plan-owned project surface policy registry.

entries.title: Seed project surface policy entries
entries.summary: Seed active policy entries covering required machine artifacts, rendered project views, and allowed optional project-local roots.

entries.title: Wire helper and project validation
entries.summary: Add typed loader support, a project surface policy helper, and validation coverage that uses the new registry.

entries.title: Build promotion and guidance index runtime
entries.summary: Aggregate initiative-local promotion records and approved plan guidance into derived plan/.wt index surfaces.

entries.title: Publish promotion policy schema and registry
entries.summary: Add the governed promotion-policy registry contract and seed the initial plan-pack promotion policy entries.

entries.title: Validate promotion and guidance lookup
entries.summary: Add validation coverage proving the new promotion policy registry and aggregate indexes stay aligned with live promotion records and plan/docs guidance.

entries.title: Define reusable rebuild harness contract
entries.summary: Add the export-safe rebuild target and result model under watchtower_core.rebuild.

entries.title: Refactor plan and project rebuild callers
entries.summary: Route plan and project derived-surface rebuild writes through the new harness without changing the current outputs.

entries.title: Validate rebuild boundary and requirements alignment
entries.summary: Add focused tests, boundary coverage, and update the authoritative requirements rows for the rebuild export.

entries.title: Add reusable rendered view builder
entries.summary: Publish a registry-backed rendered-view builder that resolves rendered surface definitions into deterministic markdown outputs.

entries.title: Refactor live plan and project surfaces onto rendered helpers
entries.summary: Replace repo-local rendered markdown assembly and drift detection with the shared builder and markdown reconciliation helpers.

entries.title: Validate rendered surface boundary alignment
entries.summary: Add focused rebuild-boundary tests and reconcile the rendered requirements rows to the implemented reusable boundary.

entries.title: Reconcile helper and runtime status rows
entries.summary: Update reusable-helper and runtime-helper status rows that are stale in requirements.md.

entries.title: Reconcile live workspace and interface contract rows
entries.summary: Update plan root, initiative/project workspace, and pack-facing contract rows that are already implemented.

entries.title: Validate and close requirements reconciliation
entries.summary: Validate the updated requirements authority surface and close the bounded reconciliation slice.

entries.title: Add reusable routing engine
entries.summary: Publish a stable watchtower_core.routing package for route selection by request text or task type.

entries.title: Add routing engine boundary tests
entries.summary: Prove the exported routing engine selects governed routes and remains distinct from CLI wiring.

entries.title: Reconcile routing requirements
entries.summary: Update requirements.md only if the exported routing engine satisfies the reusable runtime contract.

entries.title: Add focused status registry coverage
entries.summary: Lock the cleaned status-registry shape through targeted pack-context or loader coverage.

entries.title: Generalize shared status vocabulary
entries.summary: Replace the legacy challenge-scoped blocked and terminal status entries with plan-domain-neutral status vocabulary.

entries.title: Reconcile requirements notes
entries.summary: Update requirements.md so the status-registry and artifact-index leakage notes reflect the current implemented state.

entries.title: Publish rule registry schemas
entries.summary: Add governed schema contracts for the status transition and relation type registries.

entries.title: Seed rule registry entries
entries.summary: Seed the initial plan-pack status transition and relation type registry entries.

entries.title: Validate rule registry coverage
entries.summary: Add validation coverage proving the new rule registries remain aligned with live plan artifact families.

entries.title: Align bootstrap, sync, and fixture flows
entries.summary: Repair planning bootstrap, sync consumers, GitHub preview, and reduced fixture repos to use live plan task state.

entries.title: Cut over live task runtime and CLI authority
entries.summary: Replace docs-backed task mutation paths with initiative-local live plan task state and canonical status handling.

entries.title: Restore human tracker depth and markdown structure
entries.summary: Recover rich human-facing rendered tracker output and Markdown structure using selective patterns from main.

entries.title: Rewrite governance and command guidance
entries.summary: Update AGENTS layers, workflow modules, standards, READMEs, and command docs to the live authority model and restored human renders.

entries.title: Validate pack-wide and project-scoped operational flows
entries.summary: Run end-to-end operational scenarios, close the valid report issues, and record any remaining standards gaps with evidence.

entries.title: Add template validation coverage
entries.summary: Extend template helpers and tests so section-spec references and template headings fail closed on drift.

entries.title: Bind templates to section-spec contracts
entries.summary: Update template catalog entries and related family bindings to reference the new section-spec schemas.

entries.title: Publish section-spec schema contracts
entries.summary: Add governed section-spec schemas for the current high-impact plan templates and rendered surfaces.

entries.title: Add terminal closeout mutations for live initiative packages
entries.summary: Implement pack-wide and project-scoped terminal closeout state transitions that finalize initiative, evidence, closeout, and promotion shells.

entries.title: Expose terminal closeout through a maintained command surface
entries.summary: Add a CLI path and companion docs for closing live plan initiatives without manual JSON edits.

entries.title: Validate terminal closeout and clear current closing initiatives
entries.summary: Add tests, rebuild validation, and use the new closeout path to move the current closing initiatives into terminal states.

entries.title: Define reusable terminology helper contract
entries.summary: Add a reusable terminology helper for pack-local lifecycle, review, source, and task-status vocabulary lookup.

entries.title: Reconcile terminology requirements and package docs
entries.summary: Update the authoritative requirements and control-plane package docs to reflect the terminology helper boundary.

entries.title: Refactor planning vocabulary callers and add terminology coverage
entries.summary: Route live plan vocabulary callers through the terminology helper and lock alias or deprecation behavior with focused tests.

entries.title: Add workflow catalog helper
entries.summary: Publish a reusable helper that resolves workflow metadata, companions, and route bindings.

entries.title: Add focused workflow catalog tests
entries.summary: Prove workflow metadata, companion workflow joins, and route-derived compatibility through focused tests.

entries.title: Reconcile workflow helper requirements
entries.summary: Update requirements.md only if the new workflow catalog helper satisfies the reusable-core contract.

entries.title: Add workflow execution boundary coverage
entries.summary: Lock the new execution seam through focused unit coverage and package-root boundary tests.

entries.title: Define generic workflow execution contract
entries.summary: Add the export-safe workflow execution models and harness under watchtower_core.workflow_execution.

entries.title: Reconcile requirements and package docs
entries.summary: Update requirements.md and package documentation to mark workflow execution current at the reusable-core boundary.

entries.title: Cut over human instructions and workflow guidance
entries.summary: Update AGENTS, README, policy, registry, and standards surfaces so human routing no longer treats repo-root workflows/ as the authoritative backend.

entries.title: Rebuild routing and workflow runtime around split roots
entries.summary: Update route preview, route index, workflow index, repository-path inventory, and validation target discovery so the machine runtime resolves core/workflows/ and plan/workflows/ as authoritative.

entries.title: Split workflow routing and module roots by domain
entries.summary: Move shared reusable workflow modules under core/workflows/ and plan-specific modules under plan/workflows/, then convert repo-root workflows/ into a thin compatibility surface.

entries.title: Capture WatchTower implementation boundary
entries.summary: Bootstrap /home/j/WatchTower with root guidance, a Python workspace, and a minimal operator-facing CLI shell.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower readiness gate
entries.summary: Validate the bootstrap repo and keep the WatchTower project-scoped package execution-ready after the first slice lands.

entries.title: Add WatchTower next-work flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI path that selects one unfinished local work item and returns a compact resume snapshot.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower next-work flow
entries.summary: Cover next-work selection with CLI tests, exercise it against the initialized WatchTower repo, and refresh repo guidance.

entries.title: Add WatchTower status snapshot flow
entries.summary: Add a top-level CLI path that reports workspace state and summarized work-item counts from the local .watchtower store.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower status snapshot flow
entries.summary: Cover the status command with CLI tests, exercise it against the initialized WatchTower repo, and refresh repo guidance.

entries.title: Add WatchTower work-item begin flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI path that marks one local work item in progress and persists active-work metadata.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower work-item begin flow
entries.summary: Cover the begin flow with CLI tests, exercise it against the initialized WatchTower repo, and refresh repo guidance.

entries.title: Add WatchTower work-item start flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI path that creates one local work-item record under the initialized workspace state root.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower work-item start flow
entries.summary: Cover workspace-required work-item creation with CLI tests and exercise the flow against the initialized WatchTower repo.

entries.title: Add WatchTower work-item completion flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI path that marks one local work item completed and records its closeout metadata.

entries.title: Add WatchTower work-item inspection flows
entries.summary: Add CLI paths that list local work items and show one work-item record from the initialized workspace state root.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower work-item lifecycle flow
entries.summary: Cover work-item inspection and completion with CLI tests, exercise the commands against the initialized WatchTower repo, and refresh repo guidance.

entries.title: Add WatchTower work-item note flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI path that appends one timestamped note to an existing local work-item record.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower work-item note flow
entries.summary: Cover note capture with CLI tests, exercise it against the initialized WatchTower repo, and refresh repo guidance.

entries.title: Add WatchTower workspace init flow
entries.summary: Add a CLI init path that writes a local workspace manifest and establishes the managed state root.

entries.title: Validate WatchTower workspace init flow
entries.summary: Exercise the generated workspace manifest through CLI tests and update doctor to surface the initialized workspace state.
